content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market with Nifty flat, PSU banks weak (-1.54%), but metals/energy/pharma leading. India VIX easing to 17.75. Book is 55% deployed with multiple positions in green. Priority is managing existing positions — particularly TORNTPOWER which is sitting at -2.7% near SL, and trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +6.7%, NESTLEIND +1.8%). TORNTPOWER showed bullish marubozu yesterday but reversed sharply today from highs — momentum exhaustion signal.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 78.52 above SL 76.50. Q4 results were strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA improved to 1.45%), thesis intact despite PSU bank index weakness today. Stock holding above SMA20 (69.41) and pivot support 78.36. Hold with current SL — let the wider stop work given strong fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check — current SL 1032.38 already locks in ~5% gain from 984 entry. Stock at +6.7%, well above SL. Skipping MODIFY since current SL is already protecting gains adequately and target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 122.99 vs SL 119. Gold in near-term consolidation but long-term thesis (rate cuts, geopolitics, INR weakness) intact. Functions as portfolio hedge against equity exposure. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at fresh 52-week high 1437.90 (+1.8% on day, up from entry). Current SL 1418 is essentially breakeven. Tightening SL to 1425 to lock in small gain while leaving room for breakout continuation post Q4 beat. R:R: 27 upside vs 13 downside = 2.1x."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2% near 52-week high. SL 406 is just above entry 404.50; tightening to 408 (above entry) to lock in a small profit. Q4 results May 15 — want to ride into catalyst with protected downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 28,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock down -2.7% from entry 1810, now at 1754. Intraday rejection pattern: opened 1774, hit 1816, sold off to 1746. After +39% April rally, MarketsMOJO downgraded to Hold, analyst targets imply 16% downside. Bearish reversal signal at 52w high. Exit before SL 1775 triggers naturally — capture better price now via market order. Loss ~INR 1,560 acceptable; preserving capital from a momentum-exhaustion setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, stock at 1754 with 5.3x volume surge on Organon acquisition catalyst. Current SL 1740 just above entry. Tightening modestly to 1742 to keep the position protected. Organon deal is a structural positive (largest Indian pharma deal ever, scales to top 25 global). Want to ride this with locked-in breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, stock at 319.60 vs SL 318. Q4 results May 19 catalyst ahead. Defensive transmission play with stable regulated returns. SL is already tight — no need to adjust. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY order from prior session. Pharma is showing strength (SUNPHARMA +1.2% on Organon news, GLENMARK +3.6%). Let pending order work. Do NOT stack."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending TATAPOWER BUY @ 443 still open. Given I'm exiting TORNTPOWER on power-sector momentum exhaustion concerns, I should reconsider this pending order. However, Tata Power is a different leg (renewables-heavy, demand-led) vs Torrent's M&A-driven rerate. Letting the limit work — if it doesn't fill at 443, the market is telling me it's already priced. Will reassess next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 612 still open. Metals leading today (+1.05%). Let pending order work."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 fundamentals offset PSU bank index weakness; SL 76.50 gives appropriate room"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1032.38 already protects 4.9% gain; target 1095 reasonable; no change needed"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL at 119 is appropriate floor"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1418 to 1425 to lock in gains as stock makes new 52w high"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 406 to 408 (above entry) to lock breakeven+ ahead of Q4 May 15"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish intraday reversal from 52w high after +39% April rally; analyst downgrades; exit to preserve capital"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "Modestly tighten SL from 1740 to 1742 ahead of Organon catalyst-driven momentum"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 318 is tight and appropriate; awaiting Q4 May 19"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "COALINDIA, NAM-INDIA, GLENMARK all showing strong post-earnings moves but at extended levels — wait for pullback. RRKABEL near 52w high with results due April 30 (T+2) — too binary to enter today. INDUSTOWER results also April 30 — same binary risk. Adding more power names (TATAPOWER pending) needs reconsideration given TORNTPOWER exit. CUB earnings beat noted but PSU bank cluster weakness suggests no rush.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 55% deployed with 3 pending limit orders that could push deployment higher if filled. Prioritizing position management over new entries today — exited TORNTPOWER on momentum exhaustion, trailed SLs on three winners (NESTLEIND, NTPC, SUNPHARMA) to lock in gains. Power sector cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER) is now ~10% of portfolio — within limits but watching. Win rate 19% over 5 days is concerning — emphasizing tighter risk management until performance stabilizes. No new BUY entries this tick given (a) deployment level, (b) sector clustering risk, (c) numerous binary earnings events on April 30."
}
